Dixi was a great guide for our Yosemite tour! Best tour if you are in SF and have a limited time to tour the city and the national parks around it.
Brennan was such an amazing guide - very knowledgeable about San Francisco since he grew up there & super fun!  Enjoyed this day trip very much!

Just an all around great time. Awesome guide (Barry) gave us plenty of time to explore, eat, take pictures. Very nice. Made time to chat individually with anybody who had any questions and overall couldn’t have asked for a better guide. The views were awesome. Spots were good. Ride was great. Everything was awesome and straightforward. Parking is only $20 for the whole day and they’ll tell you everything you need. 10/10 would 1000% go again.
